patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952 per multiple records) with documented mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension, and anemia. Key diagnoses recorded 06/30/2023 include Mixed dyslipidemia - Primary; Essential hypertension, benign; Postoperative anemia; Unspecified anemia. Lipid panel 07/03/2023 showed Triglycerides 158 (H) and VLDL 32 (H); ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H); iron studies notable for iron 41 (L) and iron saturation 15% (L). Major recent/provisional procedures include a scheduled COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY on 02/21/2025 (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Blood pressure recorded 128/78 on 01/11/2025. Multiple care team members are listed including Hand, Hoyet A, MD and several Piedmont providers. Conflicting demographic and social-history entries (legal sex values, DOB, smoking history) are present across source documents and preserved for review.
